title: ctenitis bulusanica
intro: Ctenitis bulusanica, a species of fern, is a plant native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis bulusanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various forms, such as tea, infusion, or dried powder, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
